user_query: I'd rather do the ROM than the AGO. Change the activity on Day 3 to the ROM.

updates.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 8 > Itinerary > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

description.from: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.
description.to: One of Canada's largest museums featuring extensive collections in natural history, world cultures, and archaeology, with rotating special exhibitions and immersive galleries.

updates.reasoning: Replaced Art Gallery of Ontario with the Royal Ontario Museum per user request. Preserved the original time_block and travel_method; updated name, description, expected_cost, and highlights to reflect the ROM.
